</parameter>
</function>

sections.content:
The green squares haven't moved! They're still at the same positions:
- Left green square (W center): cols 30-32
- Right green square (B center): cols 42-44
But the bottom bar changed: from 61 c + 3 W to 59 c + 5 W. So the progress bar is still advancing even though the green squares aren't moving.
Wait, looking at the ASCII more carefully:
Row 30: `wwwwwwwwwwwwwwwNNNppppppwwwNNNccc`
Row 31: `wwwwwwwwwwwwwwwNWNppppppwwwNBNwww`
Row 32: `cwwwwwwwwwwwwwwNNNppppppwwwNNNwww`
The right green square is at cols 42-44, and there are some 'c' (charcoal) pixels to its right. This is interesting - the dark gray square on the right panel seems to be interacting with the green square.
Looking at the boundary of node 4 (c, 15 pixels): [[26, 44], [26, 48], [30, 48], [30, 45], [29, 44]]
This is the dark gray square on the right panel. It was originally at [[26, 44], [26, 48], [30, 48], [30, 44]] (16 pixels, a 4x4 square), but now it has 15 pixels and a different boundary shape. It seems to be getting eaten/modified by the green square.
So the right green square is interacting with the dark gray square on the right panel. The left green square is stuck at the purple bar.
I think the goal is to move the green squares to the right panel and have them interact with the dark gray squares. The right green square has already reached its target and is interacting with it.
But the left green square is stuck. Maybe I need to move it differently, or maybe the game requires both green squares to reach their targets.
Wait, let me reconsider. The green squares seem to be moving right automatically when I press RIGHT. But now they're stuck. The left one is blocked by the purple bar, and the right one is at the dark gray square.
Maybe I need to use UP/DOWN to move the green squares vertically? Or maybe I need to use MOUSE to click on something?
Actually, looking at the image again, the left green square is positioned at the gap in the purple bar. The gap is at rows 30-32, and the green square is also at rows 30-32. So the green square should be able to pass through.
But the green square isn't moving. Maybe it needs to be at a specific position to pass through? Or maybe the purple bar is blocking it?
Let me try pressing RIGHT again to see if anything changes.
